content: Phase 3: Update color system - atmospheric dark grays (#0D0D12), reduce glow intensity, less glass everywhere
Phase 3: Backend - add rank/weekly_growth/popularity fields + /api/tools/ranking endpoint for trending ranking
Phase 3: Redesign HomePage - minimal hero, giant search, categories, TRENDING RANKING (numbered), recommendations, brief articles, footer
Phase 3: New TrendingRanking component (numbered 1-10 with growth indicators)
Phase 3: Simplify ToolCard - less glow, less visual overload, more concise
Phase 3: Refine HeroSearch - cleaner, still hero but reduced glow intensity
Phase 3: Refine SiteShell header, footer - cleaner premium feel
Phase 3: Update Tools / Articles / Stacks / Search pages to match new restrained aesthetic
